scripts.dev: concurrently -c "cyan,magenta,green" -n api,worker,web "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run worker --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -c "cyan,magenta,green,blue" -n api,worker,web,desktop "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run worker --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix desktop"
